case_title: TRENT TISCHER et al VS. PLANT INSULATION COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: CONTINUED FROM ASBESTOS STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON JUN-17-2009 TO ASBESTOS CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON AUG-19-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 206. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; REPORTER: GISELLE CASEY CSR# 8098 (D206)

CONTINUED FROM ASBESTOS STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON AUG-19-2009 TO ASBESTOS CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON SEP-17-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 206 PER ORDER FILED ON 8/11/09 IN COMPLEX ASBESTOS LITIGATION CASE #828684. (206)
PRELIMINARY FACT SHEET FILED BY PLAINTIFF TISCHER, TRENT INDIVIDUALLY AND AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO DECEDENT JOHN TISCHER BROWNS, TRACY TISCHER, THOMAS HERDER, TERI DEN TISCHER, TIMOTHY
REMOVED FROM ASBESTOS STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON NOV-19-2009. MATTER IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: D. LOK; REPORTER: ANN MENDOZA, CSR #6812

ASBESTOS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TISCHER, TRENT INDIVIDUALLY AND AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO DECEDENT JOHN TISCHER BROWNS, TRACY TISCHER, THOMAS HERDER, TERI DEN TISCHER, TIMOTHY AS TO DEFENDANT PLANT INSULATION COMPANY DOES 1 THRU 75, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-17-2009

ASBESTOS STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON SEP-17-2009 WAS INITIALLY CONTINUED TO OCT-14-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 206. AT THE END OF THE HEARING, THE COURT ORDERED THE 10/14/09 AND 10/15/09 ASBESTOS STATUS CONFERENCE CONTINUED TO 11/19/09 AT 1:30PM IN DEPT. 206, PER REQUEST OF VARIOUS COUNSEL TO ALLOW PARTIES MORE TIME TO PREPARE THEIR JOINT CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE STATEMENT. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: E. BURA; REPORTER: VICKI GROSS, CSR# 5525 (206)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 27245555)
